tools.Name: Rapid-MLX
tools.Description: A high-performance local AI engine for Apple Silicon devices, optimized for speed and tool-calling capabilities.
tools.Use_Case: Running local AI models with OpenAI-compatible API support for agents like Cursor, Claude Code, and Aider.

tools.Name: PraisonAI
tools.Description: A multi-agent framework that facilitates the creation of autonomous, self-improving AI workforces with support for memory, RAG, and over 100 LLMs.
tools.Use_Case: Deploying complex multi-agent workflows for research, planning, coding, and task automation.

tools.Name: Local Deep Research (LDR)
tools.Description: An AI-powered research assistant designed to perform autonomous, deep research using local or cloud LLMs with private and encrypted data storage.
tools.Use_Case: Conducting private, agentic research across the web and private document libraries while maintaining data security.
